response.justification: The candidate is technically an excellent match on the stack — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, REST, Kubernetes, AWS, and even LLM/MCP experience that covers most nice-to-haves. However, with nearly 20 years of experience and current Staff-level seniority, he is significantly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid position, raising serious concerns about salary expectations, engagement with junior-scoped work, and retention.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience directly matching the core stack
Covers nice-to-haves: LLM/MCP integration work, Kubernetes, AWS (CDK, cloud infra)
Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing) aligned with clean-architecture interest
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — likely flight risk and salary mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB/MySQL instead)
Currently employed as Staff Engineer; motivation for a junior position is unclear
